site_description: India sawrkar scheme hrang hrang zawnna tur AI kaihhruaina

hero.title: I Tawk Theih Sawrkar Scheme-te Zawn Rawh

cta.title: Eng scheme nge i tan a tha i hre lo em?
cta.subtitle: Kan AI chatbot hian i profile anga sawrkar scheme-te zawn sak a che a. I chungchang min hrilh rawh, i tawk theih scheme-te kan zawn sak ang.
